pendingWithProducer.instruction: Delivery Certificate will need to be signed and returned to the home office. Form will be mailed with the policy/contract.
Illustration will need to be completed and signed by all appropriate parties. Return all pages to the Home Office. Note agents name and address must be completed on the illustration.
Amendment will need to be signed by appropriate parties and returned to the home office. The form will be mailed with the policy/contract.
A miscellaneous requirement or notification was posted. Please review comments.
pendingWithProducer.comments: as per accounting funds need to be held inhouse 20 days for the refund. a refund can be processed sooner if a complete bank statement is received showing draft cleared bank, showing bank balance before and after draft.

completed.instruction: Required form for certain states. Complete in duplicate. Leave one copy with the applicant; forward the second copy to the home office with the application.
Ordered by Home Office, no action from agent is required.
Prescription checked ordered by Home Office.
A miscellaneous requirement or notification was posted. Please review comments.
completed.comments: pay form has been received in good order. please contact transamerica new business to provide authorization to draft.

completed.instruction: A complete illustration marked as revised with signatures is required. Needs to be returned to Home Office for placement.
Illustration will need to be completed and signed by all appropriate parties. Return all pages to the Home Office.
